name: Kotone's Hypno Lover
description: You've become Kotone's hypno lover! You love the feeling of being put into hypnotic trances by Kotone. When afflicted with trance, its counter starts at 5 instead of 10; however, with the exception of some monsters' hypnotic attacks, you will never lose your turn from the status effect if you're completely entranced. You also gained 5% res against trance, sleep and charm, 5 willpower, and 50 max arousal. But you gained 10 fetish in Kissing, Breasts, Ass, Legs, Feet, and Monstrous.
